Saved dive-site coordinates take priorit: Saved dive-site coordinates take priority over raw telemetry so the map reflects the curated logbook location for each dive.

Choose which translation bundle the app: Choose which translation bundle the app should use for supported interface text. Available options are loaded from en.json, de.json, and fr.json.
Share Completed Dives And Dive Map: Share Completed Dives And Dive Map
When enabled, the public page only expos: When enabled, the public page only exposes completed dive entries and their map positions. Licenses, saved buddies, guides, and the rest of your private settings stay hidden.
Imported drafts stay private until they: Imported drafts stay private until they are completed in the logbook.
Certificates stay compact until opened,: Certificates stay compact until opened, so the saved list is easier to scan and the attached PDFs are still one click away.
Use Add License to create your first cer: Use Add License to create your first certification entry and attach its PDF.
Add your first certification entry to bu: Add your first certification entry to build a reusable license list.
Adjust the filter to see the rest of you: Adjust the filter to see the rest of your certification list.
settings.logLayout.title: Dive Log Layout
settings.logLayout.heading: Optional Metadata In Log Rows
settings.logLayout.copy: Choose which optional details appear directly in the dive log list. Core dive information stays visible; these settings control only the extra descriptive metadata.
settings.logLayout.weather.detail: Show sea state and weather conditions in log rows.
settings.logLayout.visibility.detail: Show underwater visibility notes in log rows.
settings.logLayout.wetsuit.detail: Show exposure protection details in log rows.
Add the first diver you want available i: Add the first diver you want available in your logbook forms.
Add the first guide or instructor you wa: Add the first guide or instructor you want available in your logbook forms.
Add the first site in your logbook catal: Add the first site in your logbook catalog.
Add your first regulator, BCD, computer,: Add your first regulator, BCD, computer, suit, tank, or accessory.
Adjust the filter to see the rest of you: Adjust the filter to see the rest of your saved buddy list.
Adjust the filter to see the rest of your saved guide list.
Adjust the filter to see the rest of your saved site directory.
Apply the current buddy and guide to eve: Apply the current buddy and guide to every imported dive in the queue. Dive sites stay unique per record.
Backup tasks are separated from everyday: Backup tasks are separated from everyday exports so destructive restore actions feel more deliberate and easier to understand.
Buddy names now scan as a compact grid i: Buddy names now scan as a compact grid instead of a long vertical stack.
Change the search or complete imported d: Change the search or complete imported dives before they enter the logbook.
Copy the current buddy and guide to ever: Copy the current buddy and guide to every imported dive. Dive sites stay per-dive.
Create a dive log directly in DiveVault: Create a dive log directly in DiveVault when no dive computer was used. The import queue remains reserved for dives brought in through the DiveVault importer tool.
Create a one-time sign-up link for a sec: Create a one-time sign-up link for a second diver or admin on this instance.
Create a reusable buddy list here so div: Create a reusable buddy list here so dive logs can select names instead of retyping them.
Create a reusable guide list here so div: Create a reusable guide list here so dive logs can search and reuse names instead of retyping them.
Create an invitation above to add anothe: Create an invitation above to add another diver.
Create sites here so logbook entries can: Create sites here so logbook entries can reuse them and the dashboard map can plot your dives.
Download the raw dive telemetry for spre: Download the raw dive telemetry for spreadsheet analysis or external processing.
Fetching the published dive log and map.
Finish the missing fields to commit this: Finish the missing fields to commit this dive.
Generate a printable logbook export for: Generate a printable logbook export for review, sharing, or offline archiving.
Guides and instructors now use the same: Guides and instructors now use the same denser layout as buddies, which makes longer lists much easier to browse.
Imported dives from the DiveVault import: Imported dives from the DiveVault importer stay in the staging queue until the diver completes the required registry metadata. Open a record to add the dive site, buddy, guide, and notes before it enters the permanent logbook.
Invite new divers, review who can sign i: Invite new divers, review who can sign in, and control whether self-registration is open on this instance.
Keep sign-up closed and use invitations: Keep sign-up closed and use invitations only, or open self-registration for this DiveVault instance.
Launch the Windows Dive Sync app and cli: Launch the Windows Dive Sync app and click Sign In. It will open this page with a one-time approval request so you can authorize the desktop sync session from your browser.
Locations are summarized first, with GPS: Locations are summarized first, with GPS detail tucked underneath so the list feels more like a directory and less like a long form dump.
Manage your diver identity, saved dive d: Manage your diver identity, saved dive data, certification documents, exports, and desktop sync access without digging through long forms.
Missing fields block commit but do not b: Missing fields block commit but do not block draft saves.

Register optional equipment details, cho: Register optional equipment details, choose the standard kit used on every dive, and track date or dive-count service windows.
Restore from a previously exported backu: Restore from a previously exported backup when moving systems or recovering state.
Save partial progress at any time. Commi: Save partial progress at any time. Commit becomes available once dive site, buddy, and guide are complete.
Save the license first. You can attach o: Save the license first. You can attach or replace the PDF from the saved license card.
Save this new license before uploading i: Save this new license before uploading its PDF.
Save your account data, saved lists, PDF: Save your account data, saved lists, PDFs, and imported dive state into one archive.
Saving creates a complete dive log entry: Saving creates a complete dive log entry immediately and skips the importer staging workflow.
Search from the location text, then adju: Search from the location text, then adjust latitude and longitude if needed.

The actions below are organized as clear: The actions below are organized as clear task cards instead of one long button list.

The manual dive can be created immediate: The manual dive can be created immediately.
The owner account stays protected. Other: The owner account stays protected. Other users can be promoted, disabled, or removed here.
The Windows Dive Sync app is requesting: The Windows Dive Sync app is requesting access to your account. Approve it once, then return to the desktop app to start importing dives.

This view updates the permanent logbook: This view updates the permanent logbook metadata for an already saved dive. It does not use the import queue workflow and it does not affect other dives.

Use this page for manually entered dives: Use this page for manually entered dives. Continue using the imported queue only for dives coming from the DiveVault importer tool.
When disabled, new users must come throu: When disabled, new users must come through an invite link from the instance owner.
